name: cAMP-PKA Rpn6 proteasome activation cell models
summary: Mammalian cell-line and purified-proteasome experiments testing whether cAMP/PKA signaling phosphorylates Rpn6/PSMD11 and enhances proteasome activity against misfolded proteins.
model_system: Mammalian cell lines, purified 26S proteasomes, and aggregation-prone protein substrates
